title: Private Equity Outlook Webinar 2024
content:
## Private Equity Outlook Webinar 2024
In our 8th annual Private Equity Outlook, our PE team takes stock of the lessons learned in 2023 and identifies opportunities in 2024. Join the McCarthy Tétrault Private Equity Group for a Q&A presentation highlighting key industry trends across Canada’s principal markets that are setting the pace for the year ahead. Topics include:
- 2023 in Numbers – Canadian PE Outlook
- Trends in Global Fundraising
- Addressing Conflicts of Interest
- Foreign Direct Investment: The Looming Threat of National Security Reviews
- Opportunities to Generate Long-Term Value in Distressed Assets
- Private Equity Fighting Climate Change
- Amendments to the Reportable Transaction Rules under the Income Tax Act
- Rules Impacting Investment Limited Partnerships Turn Four this Year
Speakers: Hugo Babos-Marchand , Jamie Becker , Louis-Nicolas Boulanger , Alexandra Carbone , Chrystelle Chevalier-Gagnon , Simon Douville , Sean Sadler , Debbie Salzberger Moderated by: Jake Irwin
For questions about this webinar, or to RSVP, please contact clientevents@mccarthy.ca .
Note : All instructions and information on how to access the webinar will be forwarded a few days before the event.
This program qualifies for up to 1 hour of CPD credit under the mandatory education regimes in British Columbia and Ontario.
This program has been approved in accordance with the requirements of the New York State Continuing Legal Education Board for a maximum of 1 credit hour, all of which can be applied toward the requirement.
Barreau du Québec Continuing Education : This program contains up to 1 hour of content. For more information regarding the declaration and recognition of educational activities, please contact the Barreau du Québec .
